language.primary: You have been connected with someone who speaks your language
language.shared: You have been connected with someone with a compatible language
language.fallback: You have been connected even though you don’t share a language

noModel.supply: No models are available right now

noClient.supply: No clients are available right now

quickMatching.title: Skip the search. Start the spark.
quickMatching.body: Jump into new conversations without digging through endless profiles. The flow is built to make discovery feel immediate, light and easy to follow.
quickMatching.imageAltMain: Couple chatting in a softly lit bar
quickMatching.imageAltMini: Mockup of a one-to-one video call showing the player on screen

clearFlow.title: Everything feels easier when the interface gets out of the way
clearFlow.body: The experience is shaped to stay direct, readable and comfortable from screen to screen. Less friction means more attention on the moment and less on figuring things out.

pills.cleanerInteractions: Cleaner interactions from start to finish
pills.smoothOnAnyDevice: Made to feel smooth on every device

clearFlow.imageAltMain: Person using SharemeChat across three devices: mobile, tablet and laptop

confidence.title: Confidence built into every chat
confidence.body: A stronger sense of privacy changes how people connect. With a calmer environment, clearer control and support from moderation systems, every interaction can feel more secure.
confidence.imageAltMain: Visual representation of security with a warm centre that conveys trust

unexpectedChemistry.title: Sometimes the right connection appears when you stop forcing it
unexpectedChemistry.body: Not every meaningful conversation starts with a perfect plan. Sometimes it begins with one spontaneous click, one surprise match and the feeling that you want to stay a little longer.

pills.genuineSpark: Room for a genuine spark to happen

unexpectedChemistry.imageAltChica1: Portrait of a woman with a natural style
unexpectedChemistry.imageAltChica2: Portrait of a woman looking calmly at the camera
unexpectedChemistry.imageAltChico1: Portrait of a man with a friendly expression
unexpectedChemistry.imageAltChico2: Vertical portrait of a man with a serene look

hero.subtitle: Connect instantly in a private, carefully designed one-to-one experience built to create trust from the very first second.
hero.meta: Real people, real conversations, and an environment designed to let everything flow without distractions.
hero.freeTrial: Sign up and try it FREE.

cookies.bannerText: By clicking “Accept all cookies”, you agree to cookies being stored on your device to improve site navigation, analyze site usage, and support our marketing efforts. For more information, see our Cookie Policy.

public.title: Submit a complaint
public.intro: Use this form to report content or behavior that you believe violates our rules or applicable law. We review every complaint within 5 business days. If you provide your email address, we will send you an acknowledgement and the final decision.
public.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what happened with as much detail as possible: what you saw, when, in what context…
public.descriptionHelp: Up to 2000 characters. Avoid sharing sensitive personal data beyond what is strictly necessary.
public.subjectUrlHelp: If your complaint refers to a specific page or content, paste its URL here.
public.reporterEmailHelp: If you provide it, we will send you acknowledgement and the final decision. To remain anonymous, leave it blank.
public.successBody: We have recorded your complaint with identifier #{{id}}. We will review it within 5 business days. Thank you for helping us keep the platform safe.

modelKyc.title: Identity verification
modelKyc.intro: To complete your sign-up as a model we need to verify your identity and age. The verification uses camera and document: our provider (Didit, EU-certified) reads your ID document and checks it matches your face via a selfie.
modelKyc.whyLegal: This is required by minor-protection and adult-content regulations in the markets we operate in (EU DSA, UK OSA, US Free Speech Coalition v. Paxton). It is not optional.
modelKyc.consentText: I explicitly consent to my ID document and my facial biometric data (image of my face) being processed by Didit (data processor, EU) for the purpose of verifying my identity and age, under Art. 9.2.a GDPR. Data is stored for as long as needed to fulfil applicable legal obligations and then deleted. I may withdraw consent at any time by contacting privacy@sharemechat.com; in that case, I will not be able to complete the model sign-up.
modelKyc.consentReadMore: More information in the privacy policy.

errors.generic: Verification could not be started. Please try again in a few minutes.
errors.alreadyApproved: Your verification is already approved; no need to repeat it.

processing.title: Verifying your identity…
processing.subtitle: Please wait a few seconds while we process your verification.
processing.timeout: Verification is taking longer than usual. Return to the dashboard and refresh in a few minutes.

clientKyc.title: Verify your age in 1 minute
clientKyc.intro: Our provider Didit (EU-certified) estimates your age from your camera. No document upload, no third-party sign-up.
clientKyc.whyLegal: Before you can top up your wallet we need to confirm that you are an adult. No ID document is requested unless the result is borderline. This is required by minor-protection regulations in the markets where we operate (EU DSA Art. 28, UK OSA, US Free Speech Coalition v. Paxton). It is not optional.
clientKyc.consentText: I give my explicit consent for my facial biometric data (an image of my face) to be processed by Didit (data processor, EU) for the sole purpose of estimating my age, under Art. 9.2.a GDPR. The data is stored for 6 months and then automatically deleted. I can withdraw consent at any time by contacting privacidad@sharemechat.com; in that case my account will lose the ability to top up and consume adult content.
clientKyc.consentReadMore: More information in the privacy policy.

errors.generic: Could not start the verification. Please try again in a few minutes.
errors.alreadyApproved: Your verification is already approved; you do not need to repeat it.

processing.title: Verifying your age...
processing.subtitle: Please wait while we process your verification.
processing.timeout: Your verification is taking longer than expected. Go back to the dashboard and refresh in a few minutes.

liveness.title: Live verification
liveness.subtitle: Before connecting, we need to check that you are in front of the camera right now.

prompts.PRESENCE_PROMPT: When you're ready, press "Start" and look at the camera for 3 seconds.
prompts.BLINK_PROMPT: When you're ready, press "Start" and blink twice looking at the camera.
prompts.TURN_LEFT_PROMPT: When you're ready, press "Start" and slowly turn your head to your left.
prompts.TURN_RIGHT_PROMPT: When you're ready, press "Start" and slowly turn your head to your right.
prompts.SMILE_PROMPT: When you're ready, press "Start" and smile visibly looking at the camera.

grossBilling.label: Gross revenue

refund.description: Refunds balance directly to a CLIENT through a manual ledger operation.
refund.success: Refund applied successfully. User #{{userId}} - Amount {{amount}} - New balance {{balance}}

notes.title: Notes:
notes.appliesClient: - Applies only to users with the CLIENT role.
notes.ledgerEntry: - Does not modify previous transactions; creates a new MANUAL_REFUND ledger transaction.
notes.balanceOnly: - Does not increase totalPagos; only returns available balance.

refund.title: Manual refund

fields.reasonPlaceholder: E.g. Manual compensation for stream incident

checks.balanceVsLedger: Balance vs Ledger (SUM vs last balance)

dryRun.tooltip: Dry Run: does not persist anomalies
dryRun.label: Dry Run (do not persist anomalies)

accounting.note: Use Dry Run in production for inspection. Switch Dry Run = false only when you want to persist anomalies.

runtimeHealth.description: Looks for inconsistencies between runtime memory, Redis and the database:

checks.activePairWithoutDbStream: Active RANDOM pair in memory without an active stream in DB
checks.activeCallWithoutDbStream: Active call in memory without an active CALLING stream in DB
checks.modelAvailableWithActiveWork: Model AVAILABLE but with active work
checks.queueMemberAlreadyPaired: Session queued and paired at the same time
checks.redisActiveSessionWithoutDbStream: Redis session:active without a real stream

dryRun.tooltip: Dry Run: does not persist anomalies
dryRun.label: Dry Run (do not persist anomalies)

anomalies.empty: No Runtime Health anomalies to show.

runtimeHealth.note: Use it to detect mismatches between runtime and persistence. In pre-production, run it in Dry Run.

sessionIntegrity.description: Looks for lifecycle inconsistencies in RANDOM and CALLING streams:

checks.closedWithoutEnded: Closed stream without an ENDED event
checks.confirmedWithoutConfirmedEvent: Confirmed stream without a CONFIRMED event
checks.multipleActiveStreams: Multiple active streams for the same user
checks.confirmedClosedWithoutCharge: Confirmed and closed stream without a charge
checks.confirmedClosedWithoutEarning: Confirmed and closed stream without earning

sessionIntegrity.note: This run persists SI_ anomalies for later review. It does not modify streams, close sessions, or alter business logic.

errors.run: Error running the session integrity audit

incident.description: This branch is ready for an operational view of critical incidents:
incident.note: Panel ready. Pending connection to a prioritized view of incidents and alerts.

reasons.EXPLICIT: Sexually explicit content (not allowed in profile)
reasons.FACE_NOT_VISIBLE: Face not visible or partially covered
reasons.IDENTITY_MISMATCH: Person does not match ID document
reasons.WATERMARK: Image/video contains watermark from another platform
reasons.CONTACT_INFO: Contains text, URLs, or contact information

errors.detailRequiredOther: When you select "Other", the detail is required.

tooltips.openVideo: Open video in a new tab
tooltips.openPhoto: Open photo in a new tab
tooltips.rejectRetroactive: Retroactive rejection (ADMIN): reverses the previous approval. Creates a new REJECTED row, deactivates the asset and notifies the model.

descriptions.intro: Approval queue for the model's profile photo and video. Every new upload creates a pending review; the model stays hidden from clients until both assets are approved. ADMIN and SUPPORT can decide; AUDIT is read-only.

confirmations.subtitlePending: The model will receive an email with the selected reason, and the asset will stop being visible until they upload a new approved one.
confirmations.subtitleRetroactive: This action reverses a previous approval: the historical APPROVED row is preserved, a new REJECTED row is created and the asset is deactivated. The model will receive an email with the selected reason.

fields.detailPlaceholder: Briefly explain the reason. It will appear in the email to the model.
fields.extraNotePlaceholder: Optional internal comment for the model.

placeholder.title: Foundation of the new backoffice
placeholder.body: The new landing view already groups overview, operations, models, moderation, finance, internal control, internal data, and administration. The existing modules remain alive within this structure while their internal logic is redesigned.
placeholder.note: No new backend is introduced at this stage. Blocks without a dedicated source remain marked as transition or operational placeholder.

coverage.title: Coverage
coverage.body: Random runtime, direct runtime calls, and persisted streams.

wrapper.title: Backoffice account
wrapper.subtitle: Basic information about your authenticated account and your own password change.

password.title: Password change
password.description: This change only affects your authenticated Backoffice account and uses the current authenticated user flow.
password.hint: The new password must be at least 10 characters long and cannot contain spaces.

errors.mismatch: The new password and confirmation do not match.
errors.minLength: The new password must be at least 10 characters long.
errors.noSpaces: The new password cannot contain spaces.

wrapper.title: Moderation cases
wrapper.subtitle: Review of reports and operational decisions on open incidents.

moderation.title: Moderation
moderation.intro: Operational view of internal reports. It lets you filter incidents, review details, and document an administrative decision with better context for support and internal control.

detail.notesPlaceholder: Summarize criteria, evidence, and the reason for the decision...

moderation.readOnlySupport: Read-only mode for SUPPORT. Sanction actions remain reserved for ADMIN.
moderation.reviewHint: Use REVIEWING while the case is still open. WARNING, SUSPEND, and BAN force closure in RESOLVED.

actionHelp.NONE: No sanction action. Useful to close or document the case without escalation.
actionHelp.WARNING: User warning. Marks improper conduct without suspending access.
actionHelp.SUSPEND: Operational suspension. Should be used when the incident requires a temporary block.
actionHelp.BAN: Permanent block. Reserved for severe or repeated cases.

statusHelp.OPEN: Case recently created and pending triage.
statusHelp.REVIEWING: Case under analysis by support or administration.
statusHelp.RESOLVED: Case closed with a final decision.
statusHelp.REJECTED: Case discarded due to lack of basis or duplication.

wrapper.statsSubtitle: Quick read of the current runtime status and active queues.
wrapper.title: Active sessions
wrapper.subtitle: Operational detail of active streams with inspection and manual kill capability.
wrapper.unavailableBody: Your current profile does not have access to the runtime operational blocks.

streams.readOnlySupport: Read-only mode for SUPPORT. Stream termination remains reserved for ADMIN.

empty.selectTable: Pick a table to view data.

assetModeration.subtitle: Approval queue for model profile photo and video. ADMIN and SUPPORT decide; AUDIT is read-only.

content.subtitle: Editorial article management. Simplified workflow (ADR-016): DRAFT → IN_REVIEW → PUBLISHED → RETRACTED. Orchestrated AI pipeline (ADR-014) and dynamic public publishing (Phase 4A).

assetModeration.meta: Approval queue for profile photo and video.
assetModeration.label: Asset moderation

pageSubtitles.models: Current working block for model verification and follow-up. The scope does not yet cover general user management.
pageSubtitles.assetModeration: Approval queue for the model's profile photo and video. Every upload creates a pending review; the model is not visible to clients until both assets are approved.
pageSubtitles.finance: Primary view of billing, margin and economic ranking.
pageSubtitles.financeAdjustments: Separated initial block for sensitive operations. Currently focused on manual refunds.
pageSubtitles.control: Consistency, integrity and internal audit checks for the system.
pageSubtitles.data: Operational internal queries for investigation and a technical raw layer reserved for administration.
pageSubtitles.administration: MVP view of users with backoffice access, effective roles, visible permissions and overrides.
pageSubtitles.content: Editorial articles in the backoffice. Simplified workflow (ADR-016): DRAFT → IN_REVIEW → PUBLISHED → RETRACTED.

confirmations.rejectVerification:
Do you want to reject this model's verification?
This action is considered final in the current flow.
confirmations.repeatVerification:
Ask the model to repeat the verification?
They'll receive an email to restart the process and the previous verification will be cancelled.

descriptions.panelIntro: Operational view for model onboarding and review. Filter statuses, validate documentation, and approve or reject when the current flow allows it.
descriptions.approvedMeta: Already moved into the operational flow.
descriptions.kycConfigIntro: Controls whether model onboarding follows the automated Veriff flow or the manual document-review flow.
descriptions.kycReadOnlyInfo: Read-only view of the current KYC mode. Global changes are reserved for ADMIN.
descriptions.promoteToModelTooltip: KYC verification completed. Promote the role to MODEL and activate the account.
descriptions.repeatTooltip: Ask the model to repeat the verification. Cancels the previous session and sends an email.
descriptions.noPermissionChecklistTooltip: No permission to update the checklist

kyc.title: Onboarding KYC configuration
kyc.veriffLegacyWarning: Legacy VERIFF mode detected in DB. Pick MANUAL or DIDIT and save to migrate.

errors.lookupUser: Could not look up the user.
errors.resendVerification: Could not resend the verification email.

descriptions.panelIntro: Internal administration of backoffice access for existing users. We distinguish between explicit configuration, implicit access through the ADMIN product role, and actual effective access. An inactive state blocks entry even for an implicit ADMIN.
descriptions.metaTotalUsers: Users visible in this domain, with explicit or implicit access.
descriptions.metaExplicitUsers: Roles, overrides or state managed explicitly.
descriptions.metaImplicitAdmin: Access inherited from the ADMIN product role.
descriptions.metaEffectiveUsers: Users with actual effective backoffice roles.
descriptions.createIntro: First look up an existing user by email or userId to enable internal access. If none exists, create a new internal user from scratch.
descriptions.editorHelp: Roles grant base access. Overrides add or remove specific permissions without touching the role itself.
descriptions.viewHelp: Select a user to review explicit or implicit access, effective permissions and traceability.
descriptions.rolesHelp: Assign one or more real operational roles: ADMIN, SUPPORT or AUDIT.
descriptions.keepActiveAfterCreate: Leave backoffice access active after creation
descriptions.overridesHelp: Inherit keeps the permission as defined by the roles. Grant adds it explicitly. Remove blocks it explicitly.

warnings.saveDoesNotChangeStatus: Saving the configuration does not change access status. Activation or deactivation is handled only through the dedicated button and an optional note.

empty.noUsersMatch: No users match the current filter.
empty.pickUser: Pick a user from the table or use the search above to create a new access.

placeholders.searchUsers: Search by email, role or override
placeholders.noteConfig: Short reason for the role or override change. Stored in basic traceability.
placeholders.noteStatus: Optional for any access status change.

errors.paymentsLoad: Failed to load transactions and payments

info.selectStreamHint: Pick a stream to inspect its context and events.
info.paymentsCrossContext: Cross-context view of transactions, payments, payouts and balances

descriptions.streamsResults: Entry view to investigate streams by user, specific stream or visible identity.
descriptions.streamDetail: Reuses the existing operational detail with stream events to avoid duplicating logic.
descriptions.paymentsSection: Covers transactions, payment sessions, payouts and basic balance context for case investigation.
descriptions.paymentSessions: Context of payment attempts and PSP sessions tied to the investigated case.
descriptions.payoutRequests: First useful view to follow MODEL withdrawals and their status transitions.
descriptions.balances: Basic ledger context to understand the balance and footprint of an operation.
descriptions.rawExploration: Technical sub-level reserved for ADMIN. The current raw viewer stays in place while guided internal queries are expanded.

empty.streams: No results for the current filters.
empty.transactions: No transactions for the current filters.
empty.paymentSessions: No payment sessions for the current filters.
empty.payoutRequests: No payout requests for the current filters.
empty.balances: No balances for the current filters.

filters.searchPaymentsLabel: Search by userId, id, email, nickname or orderId

home.title: SharemeChat — 1-to-1 Video Chat with Verified Models
home.description: Live 1-to-1 video chat with verified models. Free trial minutes and instant connection. No subscriptions — pay only for what you use.

legal.title: Legal notice and policies | SharemeChat
legal.description: Terms of service, privacy policy and other legal documents of SharemeChat (Shareme Technologies OÜ).

faq.title: Frequently asked questions | SharemeChat
faq.description: Answers to common questions about SharemeChat's 1-to-1 video chat: free trials, payments, privacy and safety.

safety.title: Safety and privacy | SharemeChat
safety.description: How we protect clients and models on SharemeChat: identity verification, moderation, data privacy and incident reporting.

rules.title: Community guidelines | SharemeChat
rules.description: Use and conduct rules on SharemeChat. What is allowed, what is not, and what happens when rules are broken.

cookies.title: Cookie settings | SharemeChat
cookies.description: Configure the cookies SharemeChat uses in your browser. Essential, performance and marketing.

chat.emptyState: Hi, I'm the SharemeChat AI Assistant. How can I help you?

systemAssigned.bannerHint: A support agent from the team is handling your case.
systemAssigned.fallback: Your case has been assigned to the support team.

escalate.success: A support agent will review your conversation soon
escalate.alreadyHumanHandling: A support agent is already handling your case

rateLimit.exceededRed: The AI Assistant is not available right now. It will be available again in {{hours}} hours.

errors.generic: An error occurred. Contact support if it persists.

affiliate.title: Affiliate Program
affiliate.description: Earn 30% of the purchases made by the clients you bring to SharemeChat. Share your URL or QR with anyone you like.

notActivated.title: You haven't activated the program yet
notActivated.description: Activate your affiliate code to start sharing your referral URL and earn commissions.
notActivated.kycRequired: You can only activate if your KYC is approved.

activated.qrHint: Scan the QR with your phone camera to open your referral URL.
activated.statsClicksMeta: Visits recorded on the landing page.
activated.statsCommissionCurrentMonthMeta: Current cycle (UTC month). Only paid if you bill something of your own this month.

errors.loading: Could not load the panel. Please try again.
errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again later.

hero.title: Sign up and get €10 welcome credit
hero.subtitle: Someone special invited you to SharemeChat. Create your account and get €10 of credit to explore the platform with any model.
hero.ctaLogin: I already have an account · Sign in

magicLink.title: Prefer to sign up later?
magicLink.description: Give us your email and we'll send you the link so you can continue from wherever you like (phone, tablet or desktop).
magicLink.success: We've sent you an email with the link. Check your inbox.
magicLink.errorRateLimit: Too many requests from your connection. Try again later.
magicLink.errorInvalidEmail: The email format is not valid.
magicLink.errorGeneric: We couldn't send the email. Please try again in a moment.

invalidCode.title: Invalid link
invalidCode.message: The link you opened doesn't include a valid invitation code. Ask the person who invited you to share the link again.

alreadyLogged.title: This link is for new visitors

model.message: You're signed in as a model. This kind of link is meant to invite new clients to SharemeChat, not for you to open. Copy it from your Affiliate panel and share it with your network.

client.message: You already have a SharemeChat account, so this invitation link doesn't apply to your profile. Keep enjoying the platform as usual.

admin.message: This link is for external visitors who don't have a SharemeChat account yet.

onboardingChecklist.title: Complete your account to get started
onboardingChecklist.subtitle: It takes 2 minutes to unlock SharemeChat at 100%.

verifyAge.label: Verify your age
verifyAge.description: Less than 1 minute with our provider Didit.

loadBalance.label: Load your first balance
loadBalance.description: Pick the pack you prefer. You can start from €10.
